query:
UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Alif Alif Atoll, also known as Northern Ari Atoll, is a significant administrative division of the Maldives. This atoll features some of the Maldives most pristine coral reefs and is a paradise for divers. The atoll is home to several exclusive resorts and offers excellent value for luxury seekers. Known for its house reefs and abundant marine life.',
  overview = 'Alif Alif Atoll features pristine coral reefs, excellent diving conditions, and exclusive resort islands. This atoll offers a more secluded experience while maintaining accessibility from Malé.'
WHERE name = 'Alif Alif Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Baa Atoll is a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve known for its pristine beaches, crystal-clear waters, and world-class diving sites. Home to the famous Hanifaru Bay where manta rays and whale sharks gather seasonally. This atoll offers a perfect blend of luxury resorts and authentic local island experiences.',
  overview = 'Baa Atoll is the only UNESCO Biosphere Reserve in the Maldives, famous for Hanifaru Bay. The atoll features pristine beaches, excellent diving and snorkeling, and a mix of luxury resorts and local islands.'
WHERE name = 'Baa Atoll';
